checklist.criterion: Identifies that the original story fails the Independent criterion (too broad, dependent on undefined 'improvements')
Identifies that the original story fails the Specific/Small criterion (no defined scope or deliverable)
Identifies that the original story fails the Estimable criterion (cannot be sized without knowing what 'improved' means)
Identifies that the original story fails the Valuable criterion (no stated benefit or outcome for the user)
Produces a rewritten story that is Independent — scoped to a single, deliverable behaviour
Rewritten story is Valuable — includes a clear 'so that' clause stating the user benefit
Rewritten story is Estimable — specific enough that a team could assign a size or estimate
Rewritten story is Testable — paired with at least two measurable acceptance criteria
Explains why the original story fails — one sentence per failing INVEST dimension
Uses a consistent format for both the diagnosis and the rewritten story (no mixed formats)
Acceptance criteria added to the rewritten story use observable outcomes — no vague or implementation-specific language
